underline-active.tailwind: px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-primary-500 border-b-2 border-primary-500 cursor-default

underline-inactive.tailwind: px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-slate-500 border-b-2 border-transparent hover:text-slate-700 cursor-pointer

bar-active.tailwind: flex-1 relative flex items-center justify-center py-4 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 cursor-pointer

bar-inactive.tailwind: flex-1 relative flex items-center justify-center py-4 text-sm font-medium text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 cursor-pointer
